title: Phase 8: Presence/heartbeat CoAP resource (/presence)
description: Add an observable /presence CoAP resource to the Python node. Each node broadcasts a CBOR heartbeat (node EUI-64, timestamp, RPL rank) on a slow trickle schedule. Observers see the live table of reachable peers. This is the foundation all other Phase 8 features depend on — you can't message someone you don't know exists.
close_reason: PresenceResource implemented with seen/evict/purge_older_than; observable; 12 tests passing
